product_updates.title: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
product_updates.content: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

product_updates.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
product_updates.content: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.
